description: Cross-runtime test matrix for ZH-EN code-switching (Issue #384). All runtimes must produce identical token-count behavior. The exact IPA token sequences are produced by the Python reference and verified per-runtime in each ticket's mirror tests.

cases.name: acronym_gps
cases.notes: GPS = ji4(3) + pi4(3) + ai1(2 zero-initial) + si4(3) = 11 phonemes

cases.name: acronym_usb
cases.notes: USB = you1(2 zero-initial) + ai1(2 zero-initial) + si4(3) + bi4(3) = 10 phonemes

cases.name: letter_fallback_zz_doubles_z
cases.notes: ZZ must produce exactly twice as many tokens as Z (per-letter fallback)

cases.name: trailing_comma_equiv_gps
cases.notes: trailing punctuation must yield the same tokens as bare GPS

cases.name: digits_z2z9_equiv_zz
cases.notes: digits (2, 9) must be silently dropped from letter_fallback

cases.name: two_embedded_en_chatgpt_he_python
cases.notes: non-ASCII separator (和 he) drops; total = ChatGPT + Python

cases.name: case_sensitivity_python_vs_PYTHON
cases.notes: PYTHON falls through to letter_fallback (case-sensitive loanword 'Python' miss)

cases.name: issue_384_please_open_gps
cases.notes: Issue #384 example 1 — GPS must phonemize via loanword path; full sentence verification is per-runtime

cases.name: issue_384_i_use_python
cases.input: 我喜欢用 Python 写代码
cases.notes: Issue #384 example 2 — Python via case-sensitive loanword

cases.name: issue_384_let_me_use_chatgpt
cases.input: 让我用 ChatGPT 写代码
cases.notes: Issue #384 example 3 — ChatGPT via case-sensitive loanword

cases.name: schema_v2_forward_compat_loader
cases.notes: YELLOW-5: future schema_version: 2 with unknown fields must parse without errors. Each runtime's loader is pinned by `*Loader*Schema*V2*` test.
